# Cross-Reference Density — Orphan Documents

Documents with the fewest connections to other WAF docs. Orphan pages are hard to discover and often signal content that is either misplaced or under-integrated.

**Generated:** 2026-03-31
**Documents analyzed:** 119

**Scoring:** Total connectivity = incoming references + outgoing internal links. Lower = more isolated.
